Dear Evan Hansen (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $15,002,646Details
International Box Office $2,507,213
Worldwide Box Office $17,509,859
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $763,601
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,467,177
Total $2,230,778
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A high schooler who is plagued with social anxiety concocts a story to become closer to the family of a deceased classmate.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,442,625 (49.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.02 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:85.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$28,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,364 opening theaters/3,364 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $17,643,225

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 24th, 2021 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: October 22nd, 2021 (Limited) (United Kingdom)
October 28th, 2021 (Wide) (Germany)
November 11th, 2021 (Wide) (Mexico)
November 11th, 2021 (Wide) (Brazil)
November 17th, 2021 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: November 23rd, 2021 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic material involving suicide, brief strong language and some suggestive references.
(Rating bulletin 2693 (cert #53298), 8/11/2021)
Running Time: 131 minutes
Plot point: Autism, Coming of Age, Depression, Suicide
Social setting: High School
Subgenre: Musical Drama
Source:Based on Musical or Opera
Genre:Musical
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Marc Platt Productions, Universal Pictures, Perfect World Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
